ns0:entry.ns0:title: ONLYOFFICE/DocumentServer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ONLYOFFICE/DocumentServer
Language: shell
ONLYOFFICE Docs is a free collaborative online office suite comprising viewers and editors for texts, spreadsheets and presentations, forms and PDF, fully compatible with Office Open XML formats: .docx, .xlsx, .pptx and enabling collaborative editing in real time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: acmesh-official/acme.sh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/acmesh-official/acme.sh
Language: shell
A pure Unix shell script ACME client for SSL / TLS certificate automation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bin456789/reinstall
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bin456789/reinstall
Language: shell
一键DD/重装脚本 (One-click reinstall OS on VPS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bioconda/bioconda-recipes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bioconda/bioconda-recipes
Language: shell
Conda recipes for the bioconda channel.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nelvko/clash-for-linux-install
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nelvko/clash-for-linux-install
Language: shell
😼 优雅地使用基于 clash/mihomo 的代理环境

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
Language: shell
《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀
